bindings.quest_action: rescue the captive from enemy hands
bindings.quest_focus: the old ruins where they're being held
bindings.quest_stakes: a life hanging in the balance
bindings.quest_threat: the captors who grow bolder by the hour
bindings.quest_time_pressure: every hour closer to losing them forever

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, thank the stars I found you! There's no time to explain properly, but {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} was taken by {enemy_type} while traveling the road {location_hint}. A merchant saw them being dragged toward {quest_focus}. The guards are stretched thin and can't spare anyone. {quest_time_pressure}. We need you to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I know it's a terrible thing to ask of a stranger, but you're the only one who can reach them in time.

playerResponses.text: Show me where they were taken. I'll bring them back.
Rescues are dangerous work. What's in it for me?
I'm sorry, but I can't take that kind of risk.

bindings.quest_action: clear the tunnels and free the trapped travelers
bindings.quest_stakes: the travelers trapped underground with dwindling air
bindings.quest_threat: the collapsed entrance and the creatures moving into the tunnels
bindings.quest_origin: a rockslide that sealed the caves without warning

dialogueChunks.intro: Please, {player_name}, stop! I've been running since dawn trying to find help.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes} got trapped in {quest_focus} {location_hint} after {quest_origin}. {target_npc} is among them, and they only had supplies for a day. We need {quest_item} to shore up the tunnel, and someone to fight through whatever {enemy_type} have moved in since the collapse. I need you to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: They have children with them, {player_name}. Little ones who don't understand why the walls closed in.

playerResponses.text: Children trapped underground? I'm already moving. Point me the way.
I'll dig them out, but I'll need supplies for the effort.
Cave rescues are a death trap. I can't help.

bindings.quest_action: break through the siege and rescue the defender
bindings.quest_focus: the overturned wagon where they're barricaded
bindings.quest_stakes: the brave soul who held the line so others could flee
bindings.quest_threat: the ambush force surrounding the barricade
bindings.quest_origin: an ambush on a refugee caravan

dialogueChunks.intro: You there! You look capable enough. I need help, and I need it now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} left {target_npc} barricaded in {quest_focus} {location_hint}, surrounded by {enemy_type} on all sides. They stayed behind so dozens could escape. The guards sent a scout who says {quest_stakes} won't last another night. I need you to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: One person holding the line so dozens could escape. That kind of courage deserves a rescue, not a grave.

playerResponses.text: They held the line alone? I'll get them out. Count on it.
Sounds like a warzone. I'll go, but I expect proper compensation.
If the guards can't handle it, one more sword won't make the difference.

bindings.quest_action: cut through the blockade and bring the stranded families to safety
bindings.quest_focus: the exposed ridge where the families are stranded
bindings.quest_stakes: three families with no food and no shelter
bindings.quest_threat: the floodwaters and the creatures they drew in
bindings.quest_origin: the storm that swept them off the lowland road

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I won't waste your time with pleasantries. People are going to die if I can't find someone brave enough to act.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} two nights ago. {quest_stakes} managed to reach {quest_focus} {location_hint}, but {quest_threat} are circling below. {target_npc} tried to lead a rescue party through but was forced back. I need you to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those people climbed to survive. Now they need someone to carry them the rest of the way.

playerResponses.text: I'll cut through whatever's between them and safety.
Floods and monsters together? This won't be easy. I'll need payment.
That's a job for a whole squad, not one person.
